channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: List of online shopping platforms similar to QVC offering flexible payment options
item.description: The article explores 15 online shopping platforms that operate in a similar way to QVC, focusing on services that allow customers to buy products using flexible payment plans. It explains that modern ...

item.title: Day 4 of 2026 Palarong Pambansa: Athletes Shine with Records and Gold Medals
item.description: On May 28, 2026, Day 4 of the Palarong Pambansa held in Agusan del Sur showcased the remarkable talents of Filipino student-athletes across the country. The National Capital Region continued its domin...

item.title: Experts raise concerns over declining decorum and rising tensions in Manitoba legislature question period
item.description: Political observers and academics are raising concerns about what they describe as a steady decline in decorum during question periods at the Manitoba Legislative Assembly. According to experts interv...

item.title: Vintage 1970 Kodachrome Images of the Carrington Hotel in Katoomba, Australia
item.description: The article presents a nostalgic collection of Kodachrome slides taken in April 1970 at the Carrington Hotel in Katoomba, one of the most iconic heritage landmarks in Australia’s Blue Mountains. Origi...

item.title: Anthropic Raises $65 Billion, Valued At $965 Billion Ahead Of OpenAI
item.description: Anthropic, the AI company wey dey behind the Claude model, don raise $65 billion for new funding round wey value dem at $965 billion. This valuation don put dem pass OpenAI, wey get $852 billion for M...

item.title: Rockstar Games employees announce public union amid ongoing legal dispute with IWGB
item.description: Rockstar Games developers have publicly announced the formation of a union under the Independent Workers of Great Britain (IWGB), marking a significant development in an ongoing labor dispute involvin...

item.title: Concerns persist despite revisions to Sandro Marcos’ anti-disinformation bill
item.description: The revised version of House Bill No. 9645, also known as the Digital Media Anti-False Information Act, authored by Majority Leader Sandro Marcos, has advanced in the Philippine House of Representativ...

item.title: NDC approves waivers for Omo-Agege and Victor Ochei to contest Delta senatorial seats in 2027
item.description: The Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) has approved waivers for former Deputy President of the Senate, Ovie Omo-Agege, and former Speaker of the Delta State House of Assembly, Victor Ochei, allowing bo...

item.title: Love Island USA announces season 8 cast featuring Paralympic athlete and British contestant
item.description: The eighth season of the popular American dating reality show Love Island USA is set to premiere on Peacock on 2 June, hosted once again by Ariana Madix. The series follows a group of attractive singl...

item.title: Nicola Sturgeon Faces Questions Over Husband's Misuse of SNP Funds
item.description: Former First Minister of Scotland, Nicola Sturgeon, has come under intense scrutiny following revelations that her ex-husband, Peter Murrell, embezzled over £400,000 from SNP funds. Despite promising ...

item.title: Supreme Court of Canada declines to hear Wolastoqey appeal, leaving New Brunswick Aboriginal title ruling in place
item.description: The Supreme Court of Canada has declined to hear an appeal from the Wolastoqey First Nations regarding a New Brunswick Court of Appeal decision on Aboriginal title, effectively leaving the lower court...

item.title: New restoration project brings hope for Zambia’s Kafue Flats wetland
item.description: The article highlights renewed optimism for the Kafue Flats in Zambia, one of Africa’s most important wetland ecosystems, following the launch of a major restoration initiative. The wetlands, which sp...

item.title: San Antonio man arrested over online threats against Erika Kirk prior to TPUSA summit
item.description: A 26-year-old man from San Antonio, Jacob Wenske, has been arrested after allegedly issuing threats to kill Erika Kirk, the widow of Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk, ahead of a TPUSA Women’s Le...

item.title: Vice President JD Vance cancels scheduled Colorado speaking engagement without explanation
item.description: Vice President JD Vance canceled a planned speaking engagement in Denver, Colorado, on Thursday afternoon without providing an explanation, according to a post from local Republican organizers cited b...

item.title: Kitchener farmers raise concerns over agricultural land loss amid development pressures
item.description: Farmers in the Kitchener area are expressing growing concern about the long-term loss of agricultural land as urban development pressures continue to expand across the region. They argue that farmland...

item.title: Joe ‘Ferrari’ Sibanyoni released on bail as extortion and money laundering case returns to court
item.description: Taxi boss Joe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni has been released on bail by the Delmas Magistrate’s Court in Mpumalanga after the National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) formally re-enrolled a R2.2-million extortion ...

item.title: Federal judge dismisses Trump administration lawsuit against Boston ICE cooperation limits
item.description: A federal judge has dismissed a lawsuit brought by the Trump administration that sought to block a Boston ordinance limiting local cooperation with U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). The ...

item.title: Five persons, including two children, die in Abeokuta–Lagos expressway bus crash
item.description: No fewer than five persons, among them two children, lost their lives on Thursday in a road accident that happened at Iyana Egbado along the Abeokuta–Lagos Expressway in Ogun State. The crash involved...

item.title: Siha District to host West Kilimanjaro Forest Challenge attracting over 800 participants
item.description: Siha District in Tanzania is preparing to host a major sports and tourism event known as the West Kili Forest Tour Challenge, scheduled for June 20–21, 2026. The event is expected to bring together mo...

item.title: Labor’s proposed capital gains tax changes spark concern among start-ups and young investors
item.description: The article examines the political and economic debate surrounding the Australian Labor government’s proposed overhaul of capital gains tax (CGT). The reforms are intended to reduce generational wealt...
